plot outline: In the year 2047 a group of astronauts are sent to investigate and salvage the long lost starship "Event Horizon". The ship disappeared mysteriously 7 years before on its maiden voyage and with its return comes even more mystery as the crew of the "Lewis and Clark" discover the real truth behind its disappearance and something even more terrifying.
title: Event Horizon
akas: Event Horizon : Le Vaisseau de l'au-delà (France)
Event Horizon - Am Rande des Universums (Germany)
Event Horizon: la nave de la muerte (Mexico)
